name: Fitbit
description: Fitbit is a health and fitness tracking platform by Google. Use this API to retrieve a user's activity data (steps, calories, distance), heart rate measurements and time series, heart rate variability, sleep logs and stages, body weight and composition, breathing rate, SpO2, skin temperature, cardio fitness score (VO2 Max), electrocardiogram readings, device information, nutrition and food logs, and user profile. All data is scoped to the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: activity_summary_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a user's daily activity summary including steps, calories, distance, floors, and active minutes for a specific date.

capabilities.name: activity_log_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of the user's activity log entries before or after a given date.

capabilities.name: activity_log_create
capabilities.description: Log a new exercise or physical activity for the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: activity_log_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a user's activity log entry by its ID.

capabilities.name: activity_goals_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a user's current daily or weekly activity goals.

capabilities.name: activity_goals_update
capabilities.description: Update a user's daily or weekly activity goals.

capabilities.name: activity_timeseries_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve activity time series data (steps, calories, distance, floors, active minutes) for a date range.

capabilities.name: activity_intraday_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve intraday time series data for activity metrics at 1-min, 5-min, or 15-min intervals.

capabilities.name: heart_rate_timeseries_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve heart rate time series data including resting heart rate and heart rate zones for a date range.

capabilities.name: heart_rate_intraday_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve intraday heart rate data at 1-second or 1-minute detail level.

capabilities.name: hrv_summary_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve heart rate variability (HRV) daily summary data for a date range.

capabilities.name: sleep_log_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a user's sleep log entries for a specific date.

capabilities.name: sleep_log_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of a user's sleep log entries before or after a given date.

capabilities.name: sleep_log_create
capabilities.description: Create a manually-entered sleep log for the user.

capabilities.name: sleep_log_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a user's sleep log entry by its ID.

capabilities.name: sleep_goals_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the user's current sleep goals.

capabilities.name: sleep_goals_update
capabilities.description: Update the user's sleep goal.

capabilities.name: body_weight_log_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve body weight log entries for a specific date or date range.

capabilities.name: body_weight_log_create
capabilities.description: Create a body weight log entry for the user.

capabilities.name: body_weight_log_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a body weight log entry by its log ID.

capabilities.name: body_fat_log_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve body fat percentage log entries for a specific date or date range.

capabilities.name: body_fat_log_create
capabilities.description: Create a body fat percentage log entry.

capabilities.name: body_fat_log_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a body fat percentage log entry by its log ID.

capabilities.name: body_goals_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the user's current body weight or body fat goals.

capabilities.name: body_timeseries_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve body measurement time series data (weight, BMI, fat) for a date range.

capabilities.name: breathing_rate_summary_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve breathing rate summary data for a date or date range.

capabilities.name: spo2_summary_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve SpO2 (blood oxygen saturation) summary data for a date or date range.

capabilities.name: spo2_intraday_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve intraday SpO2 readings for a specific date.

capabilities.name: temperature_skin_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve skin temperature data for a date or date range.

capabilities.name: cardio_fitness_score_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve cardio fitness score (VO2 Max) data for a date or date range.

capabilities.name: ecg_log_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of ECG (electrocardiogram) readings for a date range.

capabilities.name: devices_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of Fitbit devices paired to the user's account.

capabilities.name: device_alarms_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the alarms set on a specific Fitbit device.

capabilities.name: nutrition_food_log_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the user's food log entries for a specific date.

capabilities.name: nutrition_food_log_create
capabilities.description: Log food intake for the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: nutrition_food_log_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a food log entry by its ID.

capabilities.name: nutrition_water_log_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the user's water intake log for a specific date.

capabilities.name: nutrition_water_log_create
capabilities.description: Log water intake for the authenticated user.

capabilities.name: nutrition_water_log_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a water log entry by its ID.

capabilities.name: nutrition_goals_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the user's food and water consumption goals.

capabilities.name: nutrition_timeseries_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve nutrition time series data (calories in, water) for a date range.

capabilities.name: user_profile_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's Fitbit profile information.

capabilities.name: user_profile_update
capabilities.description: Update the authenticated user's Fitbit profile information.

capabilities.name: friends_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's friends list.

capabilities.name: badges_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the user's earned badges.
